query:
SELECT i.id, i.code, i.text, i.orderIndex, c.id as criteriaId, c.code as criteriaCode
FROM indicators i
JOIN criteria c ON i.criteriaId = c.id
WHERE c.code = '3-2'
ORDER BY i.orderIndex;
